zh.Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United: 英國蘇格蘭金洛-爾金洛斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Steidman於大約1578年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林時，他的父親William Stedman47歲，母親Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus47歲。他於1603年10月4日與Katherine Wilson在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1605年3月18日在英國蘇格蘭享年28歲。

zh-hans.Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰金洛-爾金洛斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Steidman于大约1578年出生在英国苏格兰費伏登福姆林时，他的父亲William Stedman47岁，母亲Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus47岁。他于1603年10月4日与Katherine Wilson在苏格兰費伏登福姆林结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1605年3月18日在英国苏格兰享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Steidman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Steadman
meanings: occupational or topographic name from Middle English stede ‘place, farm, estate’ (Old English stede) + -man, used for someone who lived or worked on a farm, or who lived at a place so named. Compare Stead .
occupational name for someone who worked with horses, from Middle English sted(e) ‘horse, stallion’ (Old English steda) + -man. Compare Steed .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Steidman was born about 1578, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Stedman, was 47 and his mother, Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, was 47. He married Katherine Wilson on 4 October 1603, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 18 March 1605, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Steidman est né environ 1578, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Stedman, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Wilson le 4 octobre 1603, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1605, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Steidman um 1578 in Dunfermline, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stedman 47 und seine Mutter Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus 47. Er hat am 4. Oktober 1603 in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland Katherine Wilson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1605 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Steidman è nato il circa 1578 nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Stedman, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Wilson il 4 ottobre 1603, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1605, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Steidmanが約1578年にイギリススコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで生まれた時，父William Stedmanは47歳，母Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angusは47歳であった。1603年10月4日にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインでKatherine Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1605年3月18日にイギリススコットランドで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Steidman(이)가 대략 1578년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stedman(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1603년 10월 4일 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 Katherine Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1605년 3월 18일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Kinross, Kinross-shire, Scotland, United: Kinross, Kinross-shire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Steidman nasceu aproximadamente 1578, em Dunfermline, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Stedman, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Wilson em 4 de outubro de 1603, em Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1605, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Steidman родился около 1578 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Stedman было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Wilson 4 октября 1603 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 18 марта 1605 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Steidman nació aproximadamente 1578, en Dunfermline, Fife, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Stedman, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Countesses Margaret Anderson of Angus, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Katherine Wilson el 4 de octubre de 1603, en Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1605, en Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 28 años.
